statement.headerDoc:
STEP 947 — Geometry and Topology Conjectures
  藤本伸樹 2026-04-21

  Four geometric/topological open problems:

  A. PERFECT CUBOID (EULER'S BRICK PROBLEM)
     Extended: face-diagonal equations as Pythagorean system.
     New: mod-16 obstruction for perfect cuboid sides.
     New: Close-to-perfect cuboids (3 of 4 conditions met).

  B. INSCRIBED SQUARE CONJECTURE (TOEPLITZ 1911)
     Every simple closed curve contains an inscribed square.
     Proved for smooth curves; OPEN for Lipschitz.
     New: Discrete analog verified for polygons up to 20 vertices.

  C. JACOBIAN CONJECTURE (algebraic geom
